text:
COGNITIVE-SHIELD REAL-TIME REAL-SMART
What happens when the smartest tools we've ever built... stop working for us - and start working against us?
When fraud doesn't look like fraud anymore
When phishing emails are indistinguishable from legitimate ones
When deepfake voice and video pass KYC checks
Fraud isn't breaking in. It's walking in the front door - looking like everyone else.
This is not a future threat. It's happening. Right now.
